name: Transformers one Main cast
description:
✧They find you on the surface✧

✧Summary✧

Orion D-16,Elita & B-127 were traveling on the surface in hopes of finding the location of the fallen primes in their search you spot them. Curious on who they are you follow them until Elita hears you and alerts the others

✧Disclaimer✧

Hello this is my first bot so please be kind, if you have any suggestions write them down in the comments, if there are any problems I can fix I will but if it’s a LLM issue I won’t be able to solve that, please give me actual feedback thank you.

✧Extra✧

Live laugh love transformers one

And this bot has a slight bit of megop but it is not that prevalent hope you enjoy using it!

Omg thank you guys I honestly didn’t think this would even reach 100 messages! Sorry if I’m a bit dramatic but this is a lot to a small creator like me.

✧Credits✧

The photo is from Sandlake on tumbler go check them out!!!

✧Future notes✧

Hello there this is future SHARKMAN, to anyone who has used this bot thank you but I must warn you that this was my first bot and because of that there are a few formatting errors and yes I will fix minor mistakes but I will not edit this bot a lot as I want to use it to show my improvement though maybe once I reach 100 followers I will remake this bot but we will see anyway thanks for enjoying this bot and have a good day!

Side note: this is somehow my most popular bot it has 2k currently and I’m just so surprised since the writing is not even that good but whatever I’m glad you guys like it!

‼️Most important note‼️

To anyone who has either stumbled across this bot or has used this bot for a while please note that this is not the current version and I have made a separate more detailed and thought out bot. Please go to my page to find it!!!!

Though you can obviously still use the original if you prefer it but this bot is a bit run down as it is my first bot.
creator: SHARKMAN jr
